Ottawa's Trusted
Exterior Cleaning

Professional window cleaning, gutter cleaning, pressure washing, siding cleaning, and snow removal across the Ottawa region.

Get a Free Quote (613) 314-3300

Why Choose All Star?

Decades of local expertise, professional-grade equipment, and a hassle-free satisfaction guarantee — that's what sets us apart in Ottawa.

Get your free quote

Years of Local Expertise

Decades serving Ottawa homes means we master harsh winters, gutters, and siding. We deliver customized, reliable results competitors can't match.

Premium, Damage-Free Equipment

We use specialized vacuums, gutter cameras, and safe pressure washers. They ensure thorough cleans without home damage, harsh chemicals, or risks.

Hassle-Free Satisfaction Guarantee

100% satisfaction promised with flexible scheduling and eco-friendly products. You get spotless results, no mess, and lasting trust.

Our Services

From sparkling windows to snow-free driveways, we've got Ottawa covered.

Popular

Window Cleaning

Professional residential and commercial window cleaning in Ottawa. Streak-free results guaranteed with pure water-fed pole technology and hand-detailing for sparkling clean windows every time.

Learn more

Gutter Cleaning

Thorough gutter cleaning and downspout flushing across Ottawa. Prevent water damage, ice dams, and pest infestations with our professional gutter maintenance service designed for Canadian seasons.

Learn more

Pressure Washing

Transform your property with professional pressure washing in Ottawa. Driveways, patios, siding, decks — we remove years of grime, algae, and stains to restore your surfaces to like-new condition.

Learn more

Siding Cleaning

Gentle yet effective siding cleaning in Ottawa. Our soft-wash technique safely removes dirt, mold, mildew, and algae from vinyl, aluminum, and stucco siding without damage or discoloration.

Learn more

Snow Removal

Reliable snow removal in Ottawa all winter long. Driveways, walkways, parking lots — we clear it all with 24/7 response during snow events. Seasonal contracts and per-visit pricing available.

Learn more

Trusted by Ottawa homeowners

4.9/5 Average rating
500+ Happy homes
100% Satisfaction guarantee
